content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll read each PNG image file and create descriptions for the Figma design pages.

⊰IUTP

| Page | Description |
| --- | --- |
| figma-223.png | Monthly discount screen with confirmation alert, points/currency conversion display |
| figma-232.png | Annotation: discount applies only to open invoices, next invoice if closed |
| figma-235.png | Annotation: maximum equals total points available to user |
| figma-236.png | Monthly discount input screen with validation error, points/currency fields |
| figma-238.png | Monthly discount input screen with conversion error state showing R$0.01 |
| figma-240.png | Terms and conditions screen with discount rules, application timing, important notes |
| figma-243.png | Onboarding slide 1: create vouchers with points, illustrated hand holding phone |
| figma-244.png | Onboarding slide 2: vouchers reusable multiple times while balance available |
| figma-245.png | Onboarding slide 3: discount applied automatically, visible in upcoming invoices |
| figma-246.png | Annotation: input exceeding available points auto-corrects to maximum allowed |
| figma-247.png | Annotation: "Use all" updates total points and real value fields simultaneously |
| figma-250.png | Annotation: points/real currency update when user changes either input field |
| figma-256.png | Fuel discount screen defining discount value, 25,720 points available (R$25.72) |
| figma-267.png | Annotation: discount applies only to open invoices, next invoice if closed |
| figma-270.png | Fuel discount review screen before creation with confirmation button |
| figma-273.png | Annotation: maximum equals total points available to user |
| figma-274.png | Fuel discount input screen with validation error exceeding available points |
| figma-276.png | Fuel discount input screen with R$30.00 exceeding available balance error |
| figma-278.png | Terms/conditions screen for fuel vouchers with rules and application timing |
| figma-279.png | Onboarding slide: create discount vouchers defining value and usage strategy |
